name: Egg Rolls #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet.
2. Quickly cook the bean sprouts over high heat, stirring constantly.
3. Add mushrooms, water chestnuts, and bamboo shoots; cook for about 2 minutes.
4. Add meat, shrimp, green onion, salt, pepper, soy sauce, and sugar to the skillet. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. Place 2 tablespoons of the mixture in the center of an egg roll skin.
6. Fold the two opposite ends inward.
7. Moisten the other two edges with beaten egg.
8. Roll into a log shape.
9. Pre-heat oil in either a deep pot or wide deep skillet.
10. Fry the egg rolls until golden brown, turning occasionally for even browning.
11. Remove from oil and place on absorbent paper to drain before serving very hot.
